title: Coffeenated
description: Adds caffeine, coffee, and a little more!
body:
# Adds caffeine, coffee, and a little more!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2QXfj14Q/images/8d53512fa9742b328ee6b5d5602a46e11840e841.png)

## Coffee Types:
- Regular
- Iced
- Decaf
- Latte
- Mocha

_**Different coffee types give different effects!**_

## Don't want just only drinks?
**Enjoy new blocks!**
- Caffeine Block
- Condensed Coffee Block
- Condensed Coffee Bricks
- Condensed Coffee Brick Stairs
- Condensed Coffee Brick Slab
- Condensed Coffee Brick Wall
- Condensed Coffee Pressure Plate
- Condensed Coffee Button

<details>
<summary>Decaffeination</summary>

**Don't want caffeine in your coffee beans? Place a campfire under the coffee bush and harvest!**
_(Also gives caffeine anyway)_

![Coffee Decaffeination Process](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e815eda753eaabd2e82cee38c7bcc88fcfe3ca4f.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Water Mugs</summary>

**To fill up a mug with water, right click a water source with an Empty Mug.**

![Water Mugs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01edd2d2dbd350543d7b072c22440bcfde2d2dc0_0.webp)
  
</details>
